candidate_rows.carrier_definition: native completed packet transfers on the registered route edge within the declared LGRC event-time window

causal_mediation_contract.later_local_readout_definition: observer-side-effect audit: equal-state compute-versus-omit branches process identical native continuation
causal_mediation_contract.organization_intervention_definition: not_run: neither native packet history nor finite-window relation value was clamped, deleted, or contrasted

candidate_rows.continuation_state_definition: complete LGRC9V3 current scientific state plus an exact, non-independent functional over retained native packet history

control_results.actual_result: computed_and_uncomputed_observer branches continue identically; no history intervention run

control_results.expected_result: observer computation has no side effect; mediator intervention remains not run
route_mass matched while finite-window relation changes
observable never fed back into runtime

naturalization_debt: autonomous event-time progression after route formation is not shown
the finite-window relation is not consumed by native transport
causal D0a mediation remains for Iteration 7
producer_residue: route formation and the disjoint event-time progression schedule are experiment-predeclared
the progression scaffold is not autonomous route activity
candidate_rows.route_local_surface: registered route coupling edge 0 between nodes 0 and 1

route_mass_contract.departure_arrival_accounting_policy: internal route transfer counted once as in-flight mass between debit and credit; no departure/arrival double counting
route_mass_contract.in_flight_boundary_treatment: no registered-boundary packet is in flight; internal route packets remain included once in registered route mass until native arrival
route_mass_contract.metric_measure_and_boundary_convention: fixed discrete node support with one registered outward edge; node coherence plus internal in-flight route packet amount
route_mass_contract.receiver_inside_or_outside_support: registered route-transfer receiver node 1 is inside support; boundary receiver node 2 is outside support

route_organization_contract.organization_definition: F_01(T;DeltaT)=sum of absolute amounts for completed native route transfers with arrival time in (T-DeltaT,T]

row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.positive_D0b_requires: an exact source-current finite-window flux relation remains nonzero after forming-carrier exhaustion, then decreases as route events leave the declared window under native global-model event-time progression

detail.later_local_readout_definition: observer-side-effect audit: equal-state compute-versus-omit branches process identical native continuation
detail.organization_intervention_definition: not_run: neither native packet history nor finite-window relation value was clamped, deleted, or contrasted

threshold_declaration.positive_D0b_requires: an exact source-current finite-window flux relation remains nonzero after forming-carrier exhaustion, then decreases as route events leave the declared window under native global-model event-time progression
